## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] New behavior has a regression test
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Updated docs (README / AGENTS.md / SKILL.md) where applicable
- [ ] No PII in test fixtures, commit messages, or code
